952.reason: [When there's no semicolon after an expression, the error line number should correspond to the line of the last token in the expression, but currentTokenIndex - 1 might not point to the correct token if Exp() consumed multiple tokens. The error reporting logic doesn't properly track the actual last token of the expression.]
